title: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: A central government scheme providing direct income support of Rs 6000 per year to small and marginal farmers across India in three equal installments.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with cultivable land up to 2 hectares. Farmer must have valid Aadhaar card and bank account.
benefits: Rs 6000 per year transferred directly to bank account in three installments of Rs 2000 each every four months.

title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: A crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers in case of crop failure due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops in notified areas are eligible.
benefits: Coverage for crop loss due to drought, flood, cyclone, hailstorm, pest attack. Premium as low as 1.5% for rabi and 2% for kharif crops.

title: Kisan Credit Card
description: A credit scheme providing farmers with affordable and timely credit for agricultural needs including crop cultivation, post-harvest expenses, and allied activities.
eligibility: All farmers, sharecroppers, oral lessees, tenant farmers, and Self Help Groups involved in agriculture and allied activities.
benefits: Short-term credit limit based on land holding and crop type, interest rate as low as 4% per annum with government subsidy.

title: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: A government initiative to provide farmers with soil health cards containing crop-wise recommendations for nutrients and fertilizers for individual farms.
eligibility: All farmers in India are eligible to get their soil tested and receive a soil health card free of cost.
benefits: Free soil testing, personalized fertilizer recommendations, reduces input costs, improves soil productivity and crop yield.

title: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana
description: A scheme aimed at expanding cultivable area under irrigation, improving water use efficiency and ensuring water availability to every agricultural field.
eligibility: Individual farmers, farmer groups, cooperatives, and NGOs involved in agriculture can apply for irrigation support.
benefits: Subsidy up to 55% for small and marginal farmers and 45% for other farmers on drip and sprinkler irrigation systems.

title: National Agriculture Market (eNAM)
description: A pan-India electronic trading portal networking existing APMC mandis to create a unified national market for agricultural commodities.
eligibility: All farmers, traders, and buyers registered with their local APMC mandi can participate in eNAM trading.
benefits: Better price discovery, transparent auction, reduced transaction costs, direct payment to farmer bank accounts.

title: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana
description: A scheme to promote organic farming in India by providing financial assistance to farmer groups for adopting organic practices.
eligibility: Farmer groups of minimum 50 farmers with at least 50 acres of contiguous land willing to adopt organic farming.
benefits: Rs 50000 per hectare over 3 years for organic inputs, certification, and marketing support for organic produce.
